solutions.solution:
Statements: All students like excursions. Some students go for higher education.
Conclusions: I. Students who go for higher education also like excursions. II. Some students do not go for higher education, but like excursions.

Venn diagram shows: S = Students, E = People who like excursions, HE = People who go for higher education.

Conclusions: I. Students who go for higher education also like excursions. (✓) II. Some students do not go for higher educations but like excursions. (✓)

Statements: Some keys are locks, some locks are numbers. All numbers are letters, all letters are words.
Conclusions: I. Some words are numbers. II. Some locks are letters.

[SSC (CGL) 2013]

Venn diagram shows: Keys, Lock, Number within Words and Letters circles.

Conclusions: I. Some words are numbers. (✓) II. Some locks are letters. (✓)
